title: Universal Home 100 Count 4" Cable Wire Hose Zip Ties
description:
Universal Home 100 Count 4" Cable Wire Hose Zip Ties have 8-lb Tensile Strength. These ties are great for bundling wires, cables, cords, tags, keys, and more! Use them around your home, garage, office, workshop, and so many more places. Ties also have impeccable use for Organizing Small Items, Luggage Lock, Key Ring, Save Space, Bag Handle, Attach Gear To Your Bag, Makeshift Shoe Laces, Snow Traction, Securing Makeshift Trouser Gaiters, Trail Markers, Shelter Making, Hanging Things, Snares, Repair Gear, Restraining Device, Splints, Tourniquet, or Holding Bandages In Place. Cable ties are also known as wire tie, hose tie, steggel tie, zap strap, or zip tie.
